reviews.review_msg: John is a chill guy who teaches interesting material and is easy to approach about feedback! Would recommend taking a course with him
SFU is lucky to have Dr. Bird. Genuinely my favorite prof so far– hilarious man, what a gem.

Dr. John Bird is a wonderful professor! He genuinely cares about the subject and the success of his students. He's also very understanding of how busy life gets and will let you write any missing in class assignments during his office hours. I would definitely recommended him if you're taking courses in history or Indigenous studies!
Approachable, lots of readings and class discussion, cares about students, highly recommend.
